name: Fastrack Quartz Analog Silver Dial Leather Strap Watch for Guys
strapDetails: Brown leather strap with buckle lock
description: Beef up your look with this watch. The white dial with red accents gives the watch a robust look. The brown leather strap provides a sleek finish to the watch. Pair this timepiece with a fitted t-shirt and a pair of jeans and set out in pursuit of a hunky affair!

name: Fastrack Quartz Analog Watch — Multicolour Dial, Stainless Steel Bracelet
tagline: Edge-forward design for the boldly expressive.
strapDetails: Polished stainless steel link bracelet with diver's clasp
description: Express your individuality with this dynamic Fastrack analog watch. Featuring a split-tone black and silver dial with a striking blue seconds hand inspired by dashboard design, this watch delivers an edgy, high-energy look. The sturdy stainless steel bracelet with diver's clasp ensures lasting durability — perfect for those who dress to stand out.

name: Titan Quartz Analog Watch with Date — Silver Dial, Brown Leather Strap
tagline: Timeless elegance with practical date functionality.
strapDetails: Brown genuine leather strap; 24-month movement warranty, 12-month battery warranty
description: A refined choice for the discerning gentleman, this Titan watch features a clean silver dial with bold, clearly legible numerals and a convenient date display. The slim profile and premium leather strap make it an effortlessly versatile accessory — equally at home in a boardroom or at a weekend brunch.

name: Fastrack Quartz Analog Watch — White Dial, Stainless Steel Bracelet
tagline: Clean, contemporary style built for everyday confidence.
strapDetails: Silver stainless steel bracelet with diver's clasp; 24-month movement warranty, 12-month battery warranty
description: This Fastrack analog watch combines a crisp white dial with a robust stainless steel bracelet, creating a versatile piece that transitions seamlessly from casual to smart-casual settings. The mineral glass lens protects against everyday wear, while the secure diver's clasp ensures a reliable, comfortable fit all day long.

name: Titan Quartz Analog Watch with Day & Date — Champagne Dial, Brown Leather Strap
tagline: Understated sophistication with day and date at a glance.
strapDetails: Brown genuine leather strap with buckle closure; 24-month movement warranty, 12-month battery warranty
description: Crafted for those who appreciate quiet elegance, this Titan watch showcases a warm champagne dial with day and date complications. Its slim 8 mm profile and the rich brown leather strap with mineral glass lens make it an ideal companion for formal occasions, office wear, or refined evening events.

name: Titan Quartz Analog Watch — Black Dial, Stainless Steel Bracelet for Women
tagline: Sleek, minimal luxury for the modern woman.
strapDetails: Polished silver-tone linked steel bracelet with push-button clasp; 24-month movement warranty, 12-month battery warranty
description: Sophisticated and versatile, this Titan women's watch features a striking black dial set within a polished stainless steel case, paired with an elegantly linked bracelet. The slim 7.55 mm profile and refined push-button clasp make it a seamless addition to any ensemble — from a polished work look to a chic evening outfit.

name: Fastrack Quartz Analog Watch — Black Dial, Metal Bracelet for Girls
tagline: Feminine flair with an edge — a bracelet you'll never want to take off.
strapDetails: Silver-tone metal link bracelet with jewellery clasp and serrated bezel detail; 24-month movement warranty, 12-month battery warranty
description: This Fastrack analog watch celebrates modern femininity with a bold black dial framed by a serrated bezel and complemented by an intricate silver-tone metal bracelet. The delicate jewellery clasp, minimalist indices, and slim case make it the perfect accessory for floral dresses, brunch outings, and everyday elegance.

name: Titan Quartz Analog Watch — Silver Dial, Stainless Steel Bracelet for Women
strapDetails: Polished silver-tone stainless steel bracelet with jewellery clasp; 24-month movement warranty, 12-month battery warranty
description: Designed for the woman who values subtle refinement, this Titan watch features a lustrous silver dial in a uniquely sculpted case, paired with a sleek stainless steel bracelet. Its featherlight 6.50 mm profile and secure jewellery clasp make it an exceptional everyday accessory that pairs beautifully with both workwear and evening attire.

name: Forest Men's All-Black Analog Watch — Round Dial, Silicone Strap
strapDetails: Matte black silicone strap with secure pin-buckle; lightweight construction for all-day comfort
description: Refined, bold, and built for everyday comfort, the Forest All-Black Analog Watch is the perfect fusion of minimalist design and reliable performance. The matte-finish round dial with clean analog markers and a matching black silicone strap makes a statement of calm confidence — whether you're at the office, heading out on a weekend, or dressing up for a casual night out. Scratch-resistant glass and lightweight construction ensure lasting style with all-day wearability.

name: Forest Men's Analog Watch — Square Dial, Black Silicone Strap
tagline: Geometric precision for the style-forward man.
strapDetails: Black silicone strap with pin-buckle; lightweight design for extended daily wear
description: The Forest Square Dial Watch offers a contemporary edge with its clean geometric case and sleek all-black aesthetic. Powered by precise quartz movement and fitted with a comfortable silicone strap, this watch is a stylish, low-maintenance choice for modern men who want their accessories to make a statement without the noise.

name: Laxafit Achnine Smartwatch — 2.01" TFT Display, 100+ Sports Modes, Heart Rate & SpO2 Monitor, IP67 (Grey)
tagline: Your health. Your performance. All on your wrist.
strapDetails: Soft grey silicone strap; IP67 water-resistant; Bluetooth 5.0 connectivity; compatible with Android & iOS via LAXASFIT app
powerReserve: Up to 7 days (220 mAh; charges fully in 2 hours; 30-day standby)
description: The Laxafit Achnine Smartwatch combines cutting-edge health monitoring with a bold TFT display and 100+ sports tracking modes. Monitor your heart rate, blood oxygen (SpO2), blood pressure, sleep quality, and daily step count — all in real time. Make and receive Bluetooth calls directly from your wrist, receive notifications, and personalise your experience with a rich library of downloadable watch faces via the LAXASFIT app. IP67 water resistance and a premium zinc alloy frame round off this feature-packed companion.
function: Smartwatch — Fitness & Health Tracker, Bluetooth Calling, Notifications, Customisable Watch Faces

name: Lefun Health 9 Premium Luxury Smartwatch — AMOLED Display, Gold Metal Strap, Bluetooth Calling (Rose Gold)
tagline: Luxury meets intelligence — designed for women who expect both.
strapDetails: Rose gold-tone metal strap; IP68 waterproof up to 0.5 m; Bluetooth V5.2; 250 mAh battery with quick charging; compatible with Android & iOS
powerReserve: Up to 5 days (250 mAh; quick charging supported)
description: The Lefun Health 9 is a statement of luxury and intelligence, designed for women who refuse to compromise on either. Its vivid 1.69" AMOLED display (390×390 resolution) delivers crystal-clear visuals, while the premium gold metal strap exudes timeless glamour. Track your heart rate, sleep, calories, and step count 24/7, or choose from 100+ sports modes for comprehensive fitness insights. Stay connected with Bluetooth V5.2 calling and express your personality through fully customisable watch faces. IP68 waterproofing ensures this watch keeps up with your lifestyle — rain, gym, or poolside.
